name: Sourdough Belgian Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Beat egg yolks in a bowl; stir in butter, sourdough starter, and milk.
3. Mix in the flour mixture until combined.
4. In another bowl, beat egg whites to stiff peaks and gently fold into batter.
5. Grease a Belgian waffle iron (well-buttered or Teflon) with melted butter.
6. Pour batter onto the prepared waffle maker.
7. Bake for about 5 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve immediately with your favorite toppings.
